lessons.lesson_text: Open AI-native systems essays with a concrete operating bottleneck before naming the abstract framework.

evidence.note: The revised article improved when it started from a QA queue and then unfolded the one-person project model.

lessons.lesson_text: When arguing for AI-era workflow change, test the single-owner/shared-boundary frame again in a different domain.

evidence.note: The owner/agents/boundary/evidence frame gave the article a reusable operating model.
